title: The Merciless
tmdbOverview: Jae-ho, who aims to become the number one in a crime organization, gets to build up trust with Hyun-su, an ambitious newbie in the prison. While they try to take over the organization after the prison release, their ulterior motives starts to emerge.
synopsis: The Merciless is a 2017 action, crime and mystery film from South Korea. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG12 certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
